@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "gitea-3480-ability-to-automatically-push-to-remote-mirror-repository",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "gitea: Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository ",
+    "description": "Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository . Requested by 150+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current gitea setup",
+        "description": "Verify your gitea version and configuration:\n```bash\ngitea --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working gitea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review gitea configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant gitea configuration:\nI like the feature of mirroring the repositories by pulling the remote repositories."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository ",
+        "description": "Adds the ability to push-mirror a repository to a remote destination.\n\nToDo:\r\nmaybe #2280\n```yaml\n#!/bin/bash\ngit push --mirror --quiet https://user:token@github.com/osuripple/hanayo.git &> /dev/null\necho 'osuripple/hanayo updated'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adds the ability to push-mirror a repository to a remote destination.\n\nToDo:\r\nmaybe #2280",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "#!/bin/bash\ngit push --mirror --quiet https://user:token@github.com/osuripple/hanayo.git &> /dev/null\necho 'osuripple/hanayo updated'",
+        "#!/bin/bash\ngit push --mirror --quiet https://user:token@github.com/osuripple/hanayo.git &> /dev/null &\necho 'osuripple/hanayo update initiated.'",
+        "[remote \"origin\"]\n\turl = <remote_url_here>\n\tfetch = +refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/origin/*"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "gitea",
+      "community",
+      "git-hosting",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "gitea"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/3480",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/pull/15157"
+    },
+    "reactions": 150,
+    "comments": 28,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "git"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working gitea installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:59:02.227Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
